subcodes.first_line: God willing, through the loving-kindness of the Best-Beloved of the world, may ye be ever joyous and radiant, and in the watches of night and throughout the days engaged in remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت محبوب عالم همیشه مسرور و خرم باشید و در لیالی و ایام بذکر
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity
